name: Gulf States

compliance_labels.name: Data Localization
compliance_labels.description: Data must not leave national jurisdiction

recommended_models.name: Granite 3B
recommended_models.reason: Adaptable to Arabic via SDG Hub

key_concern: TDX provides hardware-level cryptographic proof that data did not leave the national jurisdiction -- a requirement that software-only controls cannot satisfy.
aibom_requirements: Training data must be domestically sourced or formally approved
Evaluation must include Arabic language benchmarks
